falling_aquilon.name: Falling Aquilon (Ruins)
falling_aquilon.description: Fragments of the once-great capital crashing from the skies into a sea of fire.

expanding_scar.name: Expanding Ether Scar (Rift)
expanding_scar.description: A rift spewing pure chaos and consuming reality itself.

shattered_peaks.name: Shattered Peaks (Mountains)
shattered_peaks.description: Mountains torn apart by gravitational anomalies.

void_wastes.name: Void Wastes (Plains)
void_wastes.description: Lands where matter has ceased to exist, leaving only gray mist.

boiling_sea.name: Boiling Sea (Ocean)
boiling_sea.description: An ocean evaporating under the heat of out-of-control reactors.

mutant_hive.name: Mutant Hive (Cave)
mutant_hive.description: The epicenter of biological corruption, spawning twisted creatures.

burning_forest.name: Burning Forest (Forest)
burning_forest.description: Trees engulfed in eternal plasma fire that never burns them to ash.

chasm_of_screams.name: Chasm of Screams (Ruins)
chasm_of_screams.description: A collapsed underground city echoing with the cries of those trapped in time.

glass_desert.name: Glass Desert (Plains)
glass_desert.description: Sands fused into glass by orbital strikes from maddened defense systems.

storms_eye.name: Storm's Eye (Anomaly)
storms_eye.description: The center of a permanent ether hurricane where gravity shifts every second.

bleeding_earth.name: Bleeding Earth (Mountains)
bleeding_earth.description: Fissures in the crust spewing lava mixed with raw mana.

flesh_labyrinth.name: Flesh Labyrinth (Cave)
flesh_labyrinth.description: A canyon overgrown with pulsating bio-mass that consumes all living things.

ruined_sky_harbor.name: Ruined Sky Harbor (Ruins)
ruined_sky_harbor.description: A graveyard of crashed Aerowhales and transport ships.

ashen_coast.name: Ashen Coast (Plains)
ashen_coast.description: A shore where waves wash up tons of ash and dead sea mutants.
